texto: Color is the keyboard, the eyes are the hammers, the soul is the piano with its many chords. The artist is the hand that, by touching this or that key, sets the soul vibrating automatically.
explicacao: Citação de Vasily Kandinsky sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Color is the keyboard, the eyes are the hammers, the soul is the piano with its many chords. The …” articula reflexao, art, color em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
